deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, profit $42K-$62K. Close May 1, 2026. CMA shows $266K estimated value. Building branded analysis template.
deals.next: Feed data to Sirhc for first analysis sheet. Lock template for second deal.

logs.m: Investor sent deal via homesteadvested.com link. Used as basis for property analysis tool.

deals.title: Borregas
deals.notes: Land/acreage development potential. Sisters want to end listing. Isaac interested in mobile home development (~$150K offer). Title defect: incomplete legal description. Correction deed in progress with Van Hutchins.
deals.next: Confirm sisters decision on listing extension. Discuss Isaac offer formally. Connect Isaac with Josh LT for partnership.

logs.m: Price adjustment needed. Follow up with prior buyers. Isaac expanding to 10-acre lots with mobile homes. Josh LT potential partner.
Jennifer Ball resolved title defect. Attorney Van Hutchins preparing Correction Deed.
Chris updated sisters on showing. Isaac discussed $150K development offer. Sisters enthusiastic about development angle.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Vacant 6 months, double-carrying. Payoff ~$493K, market value $350K-$400K. Underwater $93K-$143K. Three paths: short sale, VA assumption, or bring cash. Chandler laid off, hardship documented.
deals.next: Talk to broker first. Call sellers with three paths. If short sale: start Newrez packet.

logs.m: Call completed. Chandler laid off, strong hardship docs. Sellers leaning short sale. Appreciated honest approach.
Where Things Stand email sent. Option 3 highlighted at $518,999. Full market analysis presented.
Buyer showing scheduled. Lawn care referrals received.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: Divorce, need to sell. 3BR/2BA, 1,809 sqft, 4.05 acres. Payoff ~$257K. CMA recommends $295K listing. Thin market, 3 comps in 10 miles. Net proceeds scenarios: $275K = -$4,300 to $315K = +$33,700.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter. Confirm acreage. Get listing agreement signed. Schedule professional photos.

logs.m: Met at property. CMA pulled. Payoff confirmed at $255,578 as of Feb 2026.
Prior clients from VA renovation loan purchase. Going through divorce, need to finish and sell.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: Referral from Isaac. Must sell second week June. 3BR/2.5BA. Payoff ~$257K, asking $250K-$270K. Recommended $259,900. Hairline foundation crack. Insurance roof claim in progress.
deals.next: Monitor offers. Investor cash offer at $176,300 received - likely not end buyer. Continue marketing.

logs.m: Texted Jose and Katy about investor offer at $176,300. Kept conversation open. 4th showing scheduled May 23.
MLS live. Canvassed neighborhood. First showing feedback: cultural concern about direction, roof situation explained.
Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG. Going live May 13.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Cash transaction $152,000. Buyer: military. Lien blocker resolved Apr 21 via Fernando Castillo signature. Cleared and funded Apr 26.
deals.next: Confirm commission received. Deliver Joy gift. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Joy gift delivery, rug, and trolley still pending.
Lien release signed by Fernando Castillo at mobile notary. Delivered to Chicago Title.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned. Damage occurred after bank possession. Contractor work active - floor demo complete, drywall cut. Utilities being set up: Medina Electric and East Medina County SUD confirmed.
deals.next: Get transformer number on-site. Submit Medina Electric application. Confirm water setup. Send listing agreement to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.

logs.m: Cleanup active. Floor demo complete. Drywall cut for electrician and plumber. New drywall on site ready.
On-site visit. Met Bryce (dumpster contractor). His wife is active military - VA buyer lead.
Met with Matt Toney. Connected directly with Jerry Sadler. Goal: work starts by Monday.

deals.title: Tilden 20 Acres
deals.notes: 20 acres, hunting property. Current offer dead - Michael Rodriguez, RBFCU financing stalled. Steve clearing property. Price adjusted to $117,500. No urgency currently.
deals.next: Follow up once clearing complete. Frame next offer with net after close, not gross price.

logs.m: Steve signed amendment. MLS updated to $117,500. Exclusions locked. Agent outreach in progress.
Clearing complete. Steve sent new photos. Current offer dead - no earnest money received.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss
deals.notes: Brand new 2025 Lennar home in Grace Gardens. 1,535 sqft, 3BR/2.5BA. Rental price $1,595/month. Jimbo renting 2 years then owner-occupy from California. WiFi and W/D hookup included.
deals.next: Photos are priority. Drop sign with QR code. Set up Linktree listing link.

logs.m: Photos identified as priority before listing goes live. Sign drop happening today.
Listing agreement reviewed. 12 questions sent to Jimbo. All answered same day. Ready for Skyslope.
Talked to Jimbo on road to Devine. Son made flyers - need to review.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through garden share group. Grief to healing to plants story. Potential content collaboration and long-term real estate relationship.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission for story. Keep nurturing - no rush on real estate.

leads.title: Isaac Linares
leads.detail: Active investor and referral source. Already sent two deals (Borregas, Mill Path). Partner with mobile home development and other ventures.
leads.next: Full intake on remaining buy box. Connect with deals matching criteria.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental being sold. Need to move fast. Pivoting to new construction. No HOA firm requirement. Pre-approval status unknown with Zach Schaphorst.
leads.next: Confirm pre-approval status with Zach. Set up new construction platform. Identify builders with no HOA.

leads.title: Kurt
leads.detail: Neighbor around corner from 9815 Conbes. Interested in nearby listing intelligence. Possible seller or buyer lead.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurts area. Get 9815 Conbes offer details. Report back to Kurt.

leads.title: Bryce & Wife (VA Buyer)
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. Wife is active military - VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio. Looking to purchase in San Antonio area. Zero down, no PMI advantage.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info. Confirm wife VA eligibility. Send VA Buyers Guide.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent in Schertz/Cibolo. Has buyer interested in property needing work. Unique situation - details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome. Get full details on buyer and property. Identify matching inventory.

leads.title: Christina Shine
leads.detail: Met at garden event May 9. Plans to sell 13810 Tangle Tree St soon. Already working with realtor. Property 90% complete - having trouble finishing. Open to selling as-is.
leads.next: Follow up on finishing progress. Offer to promote listing. Position as natural next call if current agent does not work out.

leads.title: Miss Pat's Neighbor - Son
leads.detail: Inherited property - father recently passed away. Father was avid gardener. Son now owns house. Property may need attention or sale. Sensitive situation.
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat. Reach out to son as neighbor and gardener first. Assess if keeping, renting, or selling.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship. Helped Brandon get started in real estate. Two opportunities: Green Bliss rental setup (uncle Jimbo) and Mom (Milagros) new construction buyer in Grace Gardens or similar.
leads.next: Get Mom contact info. Call Carlos McLean 210-605-0241 before builder visit. Register as buyer agent on first visit.

leads.title: Milagros Stringer
leads.detail: Brandon Moran's mom. Buying new construction, likely Grace Gardens or similar. Budget $50K down, target ~$1,000/month payment. Buyer rep sent May 11 - not yet signed.
leads.next: Follow up on buyer rep signature. Confirm pre-approval. Set up builder visits with Carlos McLean.

priorities.title: 340 Sollock - Critical Path
priorities.notes: Double-carrying, $93K-$143K underwater. Three paths identified. Chandler has hardship docs. Need broker guidance then seller conversation.

followUps.text: Call broker - short sale protocol and investor introduction guidelines
Call Matt and Chandler with three paths - get decision on direction
If Path A: start Newrez short sale packet with hardship letter

priorities.title: 181 CR 7751 - Ready to List
priorities.notes: Renovation 90% done. Utilities setup in progress. Listing agreement still needs to go to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham at Priority Bank.

followUps.text: Get transformer number on-site tomorrow - submit Medina Electric application
Send listing agreement to Jerry and Ray at Priority Bank

priorities.title: 8527 Green Bliss Rental Launch
priorities.sub: New rental listing ready for photos and sign
priorities.notes: Brand new Lennar home. Jimbo answered all 12 listing questions May 14. Ready for Skyslope. Photos are highest priority before going live.

followUps.text: Get professional photos - priority before listing goes live
Drop sign with QR code directing to listing
Set up Linktree landing page for rental listing link

priorities.title: Colton Brown - Listing Consultation
priorities.notes: Met at property May 15. CMA done. Payoff confirmed. Net sheet built. Need updated payoff letter and listing agreement signed.

followUps.text: Get updated payoff letter from lender before listing

priorities.title: Milagros Stringer - New Construction
priorities.sub: Buyer rep signed, builder visits pending
priorities.notes: Brandon Moran's mom. $50K down, target payment ~$1,000/month. Buyer rep sent May 11. Need signature and builder tour scheduled.

followUps.text: Follow up on buyer rep signature from Milagros
Call Carlos McLean 210-605-0241 at Grace Gardens before visit
Schedule model home visits with Brandon and Milagros together
